title: WalletWall ZK Adapter Evidence Endpoint — Success Response (v1)
description: The deterministic 200 success response a hosted, READ-ONLY ZK-adapter evidence endpoint would return: the committed ZK verifier adapter boundary (walletwall.zk-verifier-adapter.v1) wrapped with `servedAt` and a strong `etag` (keccak256 content hash of the adapter) for caching and conditional re-fetch. This is a non-production SPIKE: no server, no network listener, no secrets, read-only. The served adapter is not a proof, not production ZK verification, and not on-chain ML-DSA verification. Research prototype; not audited; testnet/local only; no real funds. The dependency-light TypeScript validator in scripts/lib/zk-adapter-endpoint.ts (which reuses validateAdapter for the embedded adapter) is the authoritative in-repo check.

etag.description: Strong ETag: keccak256 of the canonical adapter JSON.

adapter.description: The served walletwall.zk-verifier-adapter.v1 boundary. Validated in depth by validateAdapter (see evidence/zk/schema/zk-verifier-adapter.v1.schema.json).
